name: Apple Cake with Icing
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all cake ingredients together and pour into a 9 x 13-inch oblong pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 45 minutes or until a cake tester comes out clean when inserted in the center of the cake.
3. Cook icing ingredients in a small saucepan for 2 1/2 minutes.
4. Pour the icing over the warm cake.
